hold on.translate: 1) Ждать (по телефону, в разговоре) 2) Держаться, цепляться
examples: Hold on tight to the rope!
Can you hold on for a moment?
Hold on, let me think about it.
Hold on, I'll be right there.
She held on to the railing.
Just hold on a little longer.
He held on during the difficult time.
hold on.synonyms:
Ждать (по телефону, в разговоре) - wait, hang on
Держаться, цепляться - grip, cling
